technical_debt.substitution: Docker image requires `docker build` on first use (2–3 min) before `docker compose up` achieves sub-30s startup; subsequent runs use cached layers and meet the 30s requirement
technical_debt.reason: ADR-04 chose pre-built bundle; npm pack cannot include a pre-built Docker image; build must happen on user's machine

technical_debt.substitution: CLI monitor `cmdMonitor` uses `setInterval` with full screen clear+redraw (ANSI ESC[2J) instead of partial row updates; causes brief flicker on slow terminals
technical_debt.reason: ADR-02 chose full redraw for simplicity; partial update requires cursor positioning state machine which is out of scope for v1

technical_debt.substitution: `cmdSetup` uses Node.js `readline.createInterface` which requires a real TTY; it does not support non-interactive (piped) setup — users must run it interactively
technical_debt.reason: Non-interactive setup (e.g. via config file) was not in the IDEA.md requirements for v1; ≤5 prompts constraint implies human interaction
